title: Real Madrid Storm into UCL Quarter-Finals After 5-1 Aggregate Win Over Man City
summary: Vinicius Jr. scored twice at the Etihad as Real Madrid secured a 2-1 second-leg victory (5-1 aggregate) to eliminate the Premier League champions.
author: UEFA Media

title: Cristiano Ronaldo Ruled Out of Portugal Friendlies Due to Hamstring Injury
summary: The Al-Nassr star will miss matches against Mexico and the USA; he is currently in Madrid undergoing rehabilitation to be fit for the 2026 World Cup.
author: Reuters

title: Manchester United Held to 2-2 Draw by Bournemouth; Harry Maguire Sent Off
summary: Despite a Bruno Fernandes penalty, a late red card for Maguire allowed Junior Kroupi to equalize for the Cherries at the Vitality Stadium.
author: Peter Smith

title: Barcelona Crush Newcastle 7-2 in UCL Masterclass to Advance
summary: Hansi Flick's side matched a record for goals in a knockout game, with Raphinha and Lewandowski both bagging braces at the Spotify Camp Nou.
author: Sports Desk

title: Liverpool Overturn Deficit to Beat Galatasaray 4-0 at Anfield
summary: Goals from Szoboszlai, Ekitike, Gravenberch, and Salah ensured The Reds progressed to the Quarter-Finals after an early scare in Turkey.
author: Phil McNulty

title: Real Madrid vs Atletico Madrid: Team News Ahead of Sunday's Derby
summary: Arbeloa's side faces Matchday 29 at the Bernabéu; Bellingham and Militao are training partially but remain doubtful for the starting XI.
author: Staff Writer

title: Chelsea Midfielder Enzo Fernandez Linked with Potential Summer Move
summary: Reports suggest Fernandez may be open to a La Liga move this summer, with Real Madrid maintaining a long-standing interest in the Argentine.
author: Ruairidh Barlow

title: Bayern Munich Dismantle Atalanta 10-2 on Aggregate in UCL Rout
summary: The German giants confirmed their status as title favorites with a 4-1 second-leg win, following their 6-1 thrashing in the first leg.
author: German Media

title: UCL Quarter-Final Draw: Arsenal Set to Face Sporting CP
summary: The Gunners will travel to Lisbon for the first leg after Sporting shocked Bodo/Glimt to reach the final eight.
author: Media Team

title: Lionel Messi Scores 900th Career Goal in Milestone Inter Miami Victory
summary: Messi joins Ronaldo in the elite 900-goal club with a stunning free-kick in MLS action, as his form shows no signs of slowing down.
author: Liam Twomey

title: Inter Milan Lower Asking Price for Alessandro Bastoni Amid Barca Interest
summary: With financial pressure mounting, Inter may accept a lower fee for the star defender, alerting both Barcelona and Liverpool.
author: Staff Writer

title: Tottenham Out of UCL Despite 3-2 Win Over Atletico Madrid
summary: A spirited performance at the Tottenham Hotspur Stadium wasn't enough to overturn a 5-2 first-leg deficit, ending Spurs' European run.
author: Simon Stone

title: Kees Smit Hints at La Liga Preference Over Premier League Move
summary: The highly-rated midfield talent has admitted he would love to play in Spain, boosting Real Madrid's hopes of a summer signing.
author: Admin

title: Erling Haaland Leads Golden Boot Race with 29 Goal Contributions
summary: Haaland remains the most prolific striker in Europe this season, though Bruno Fernandes has closed the gap to just five goal involvements.
author: PL Media

title: Man United Standing Firm Against Barcelona Bid for Marcus Rashford
summary: Despite a fresh £26m permanent offer from the Catalan giants, United have no intention of letting their forward leave this summer.
author: Media Desk

title: FIFA Confirms Final Venue List for 2030 World Cup Centenary Edition
summary: The tournament will span six nations across three continents, with Spain and Morocco hosting the bulk of the knockout stages.
author: FIFA Media

title: Arda Guler Shines in Real Madrid Training Ahead of Madrid Derby
summary: The young Turkish international is pushing for a start against Atletico after impressing the coaching staff in the recovery session.
author: Tomás Roncero

title: Al-Nassr Maintain Top Spot in Saudi Pro League Despite Ronaldo Absence
summary: The Riyadh-based club sits on 67 points from 26 matches, leading the title charge as they await the captain's return from injury.
author: Liam Twomey

title: Gennaro Gattuso Recalls Federico Chiesa for Italy's World Cup Play-offs
summary: The Italy boss has named a 28-man squad to face Northern Ireland, with Chiesa returning to lead the attack in a crucial qualification tie.
author: Ivan Zazzaroni

title: Real Madrid Hit with Courtois Quad Injury Ahead of Madrid Derby
summary: The Belgian keeper is expected to be out for six weeks, meaning Andriy Lunin will start against Atletico Madrid tomorrow.
author: Lucas Navarrete
